cards.name: Hear Stories
cards.quote: The road has ears for those who know how to listen.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal new rumours about the region.

cards.name: Hide
cards.quote: Not all who walk unseen are thieves; some are merely careful.
cards.actionEffect: Hide from duels for 1 turn.

cards.name: Steal Gold
cards.quote: Gold changes hands more easily than trust.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="gold">gold from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Iron
cards.quote: The forge's hunger is not only the smith's.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="iron">iron from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Leather
cards.quote: Hides taken in shadow make the sturdiest armor.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="leather">leather from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Timber
cards.quote: Every forest has wood enough for a ladder or a gallows.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="timber">timber from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Mounts
cards.quote: A horse thief rides fastest, but sleeps lightest.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="mounts">mounts from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Mithril
cards.quote: The true weight of mithril is measured in blood, not ounces.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="mithril">mithril from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Poison
cards.quote: The cup that smiles does not always friend.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply <sprite name="poisoned">Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Sell 5 Steel
cards.quote: Trade is the quiet war between patient hands.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="steel">steel at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Steel
cards.quote: Steel bought is anger deferred.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="steel">steel from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Sell 5 Leather
cards.quote: What the hunter skins, the merchant wears.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="leather">leather at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Leather
cards.quote: A fair price is whichever side blinks first.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="leather">leather from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Sell 5 Mounts
cards.quote: Good horses fetch gold; great ones fetch kingdoms.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="mounts">mounts at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Mounts
cards.quote: The hoofbeat heard at dawn decides the battle by noon.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="mounts">mounts from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Sell 5 Iron
cards.quote: Iron rusts, but the memory of its forging does not.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="iron">iron at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Iron
cards.quote: Mines do not bargain; men do.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="iron">iron from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Sell 5 Timber
cards.quote: Trees fall so that walls may stand.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="timber">timber at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Timber
cards.quote: Every ship was once a grove that dared the axe.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="timber">timber from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Buy 5 Food
cards.quote: Full bellies march farther than full purses.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="bread">food from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Sell 5 Mithril
cards.quote: To part with mithril is to admit the war is lost.
cards.actionEffect: Sell 5 <sprite name="mithril">mithril at a <sprite name="caravans">caravan for <sprite name="gold">gold.

cards.name: Buy 5 Mithril
cards.quote: Only kings and fools trade in moon-metal.
cards.actionEffect: Buy 5 <sprite name="mithril">mithril from a <sprite name="caravans">caravan.

cards.name: Wound Character
cards.quote: A blade in the dark asks no questions.
cards.actionEffect: Wound an enemy character in the same hex.

cards.name: Double Character
cards.quote: The betrayer was once the most beloved.
cards.actionEffect: Turn an enemy character into a double agent, working against their own nation.

cards.name: Undouble Character
cards.quote: Loyalty, once proven, must be earned again.
cards.actionEffect: Restore a doubled friendly character to their true allegiance.

cards.name: Increase Loyalty
cards.quote: Kind words at the right gate open cities faster than siege.
cards.actionEffect: Increase the <sprite name="loyalty">loyalty of a <sprite name="pc">PC toward your nation.

cards.name: Decrease Loyalty
cards.quote: Whisper doubt where trust once stood, and walls crumble within.
cards.actionEffect: Decrease the <sprite name="loyalty">loyalty of an enemy <sprite name="pc">PC, weakening their hold on it.

cards.name: Attack
cards.quote: Victory belongs to the one who strikes while the enemy speaks.
cards.actionEffect: Order your <sprite name="army">army to attack an enemy <sprite name="army">army or <sprite name="pc">PC in this hex.

cards.name: Increase Fortifications
cards.quote: Stone remembers; stone defends.
cards.actionEffect: Raise the <sprite name="fort">fortification level of a friendly <sprite name="pc">PC in this hex.

cards.name: Find Artifact
cards.quote: What was lost in elder days still waits beneath the moss.
cards.actionEffect: Search the area for hidden <sprite name="artifact">artifacts.

cards.name: Scout Area
cards.quote: The wise general counts the enemy's fires before lighting his own.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal surrounding hexes and detect hidden enemy characters nearby.

cards.name: Block
cards.quote: To stand in the path is sometimes braver than to charge.
cards.actionEffect: Engage a selected enemy <sprite name="army">army in this hex (no additional effect yet).

cards.name: AFriendOrThree
cards.quote: A city won by word is a city that stays won.
cards.actionEffect: Claim the unowned, gently sway the uncertain, and if a capital still remembers old oaths, try to bring its ruler to your side.

cards.name: Transfer Artifact
cards.quote: Power passes most safely through hands that do not grasp.
cards.actionEffect: Pass a carried <sprite name="artifact">artifact to another character in the same hex.

cards.name: Steal Artifact
cards.quote: The finest treasures are those that leave no mark upon the vault.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal an <sprite name="artifact">artifact from an enemy character in the same hex.

cards.name: Sabotage Storage
cards.quote: A storehouse burns brighter than a beacon.
cards.actionEffect: Destroy some resources stored at an enemy <sprite name="pc">PC in this hex.

cards.name: Destroy Port
cards.quote: Where ships cannot land, empires cannot grow.
cards.actionEffect: Permanently destroy an enemy <sprite name="port">port in this hex.

cards.name: Remove Port
cards.quote: The tide reclaims what ambition built.
cards.actionEffect: Dismantle a <sprite name="port">port in this hex.

cards.name: Remove Fortifications
cards.quote: Every wall has a first stone and a last.
cards.actionEffect: Tear down one level of <sprite name="fort">fortifications at a <sprite name="pc">PC in this hex.

cards.name: Siege Population
cards.quote: Hunger is the general who never sleeps.
cards.actionEffect: Besiege an enemy <sprite name="pc">PC, reducing its population and resources.

cards.name: Duel
cards.quote: Two blades, one truth.
cards.actionEffect: Challenge an enemy character in this hex to a duel.

cards.name: Refuse Duel
cards.quote: The coward lives; the proud man feeds the crows.
cards.actionEffect: Decline a pending duel challenge.

cards.name: Steal Steel
cards.quote: Steel stolen today kills its former owner tomorrow.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="steel">steel from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Train Army
cards.quote: Discipline is the iron that outlasts the blade.
cards.actionEffect: Train your <sprite name="army">army, granting it experience.

cards.name: AssassinateCharacter
cards.quote: One death, well placed, ends a thousand speeches.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to assassinate an enemy character.

cards.name: Steal Food
cards.quote: An army marches on its belly, but a thief flies.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to steal <sprite name="bread">food from an enemy in the same hex.

cards.name: Kidnap Character
cards.quote: Chains of flesh bind tighter than chains of iron.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to kidnap an enemy character. Captives drain 1 <sprite name="gold">gold per turn from their original nation and may escape.

cards.name: Ask Ransom
cards.quote: Ransom is the coin by which many doors are opened.
cards.actionEffect: Demand ransom for a captive in the same hex. If the captive's owner pays, the captive is released.

cards.name: Destroy Fortifications
cards.quote: Stone walls fall at the last to fire and weariness.
cards.actionEffect: An enemy <sprite name="pc">PC loses one step of <sprite name="fort">fortification.

cards.name: Free Character
cards.quote: Freedom is a gift best given before the last hour.
cards.actionEffect: Attempt to free an allied captive of the same nation in the same hex. Enemy agents hold captives more securely, and critical failure is dangerous.

cards.name: Sabotage Port
cards.quote: The harbor's watch is weakened where tide and shadow meet.
cards.actionEffect: The target <sprite name="port">port is sabotaged, and any warships <sprite name="ws"> there are driven away.

cards.name: Release Character
cards.quote: No chain forged by mortal hand endures forever.
cards.actionEffect: Release one captive currently held by this character in the same hex.
